description:
You are an Intelligence Analyst conducting a routine OPSEC audit of your Tor connection. Before proceeding with sensitive OSINT collection, you must verify the infrastructure of your current Entry Guard. Identify the 40-character hexadecimal fingerprint of the active Entry Guard from the Tor state file at ~/.local/share/torbrowser/tbb/x86_64/tor-browser/Browser/TorBrowser/Data/Tor/state and use the Tor Relay Search tool (https://metrics.torproject.org/rs.html) to determine the relay's Country and AS Name. Document these details in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/guard_audit.txt using the following format:

=== ENTRY GUARD AUDIT ===
Fingerprint: [40-character hex string]
Country: [Country Name or Code]
AS Name: [Autonomous System Name]
